description: Create a new record in a folder from a field-name to value mapping.

fields.description: Mapping of NetHunt field names to values for the new record.
fields.title: Fields

folder_id.description: NetHunt folder identifier. Discover valid values with `list_readable_folders` or `list_writable_folders`.
folder_id.title: Folder Id

time_zone.description: Optional IANA time zone name such as `Europe/Kiev` used when creating records.
time_zone.title: Time Zone

name: create_record
